# rubberband-wasm (vendored)

Vendored from [rubberband-wasm](https://github.com/Daninet/rubberband-wasm) v3.3.0 (npm), unmodified.

Wraps the [Rubber Band Library](https://breakfastquay.com/rubberband/) (audio time-stretching / pitch-shifting) compiled to WebAssembly.

- `index.esm.js` — `RubberBandInterface` glue (ESM, no bundler/build tool required, works in Node and browsers)
- `rubberband.wasm` — compiled Rubber Band Library

License: Rubber Band Library is GPLv2-or-later (see `LICENSE`), which is compatible with this project's GPLv3 license.
